api.title: API
api.description: Use the GraphQL API to build integrations, automate your workflow, and connect Linear to your existing tools.
api.slackCommunityLink: Join the Linear API Slack community
api.slackToast: Opening the Linear API Slack community...
api.oauthAppsDescription: OAuth applications you have registered. These let third-party apps act on behalf of your users.
api.oauthEmptyDescription: Create an OAuth application to allow third-party apps to authenticate with Linear on behalf of your users.
api.webhooksDescription: Webhooks let you receive real-time updates when data changes in Linear.
api.webhookEmptyDescription: Create a webhook to receive real-time HTTP notifications when data changes in Linear.
api.personalApiKeysDescription: Use personal API keys to authenticate with the Linear API.
api.apiKeyEmptyDescription: Create a personal API key to start using the Linear API.
api.apiKeyPermissionDescription: Control who can create personal API keys in this workspace.
